'''Tolra''' was a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who lived on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] with his family. He contracted the [[Krytos virus]] when [[Ysanne Isard]] released it upon the capital. Tolra realized that he was unwell and separated himself from his family to prevent them from contracting the [[virus]]. He died in his hovel on Coruscant.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: The Krytos Trap]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: The Krytos Trap (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
